name: Sagami Rubber Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Sagami Rubber Industries Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and supplies condoms. The company offers polyurethane and latex condoms, external catheters, and probe covers; plastic films; and healthcare products and services. It sells its products in Japan, France, Switzerland, Italy, Portugal, Spain, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Korea, Vietnam, Mexico, and the United States. The company was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Atsugi, Japan.
